result.text:
SPI Specification v1.0

1. Overview
The SPI module implements 4-wire serial interface for synchronous data transfers.

2. Interface Signals
- clk: 1-bit input clock
- rst_n: 1-bit active-low reset
- mosi: 1-bit input master-out-slave-in
- miso: 1-bit output master-in-slave-out
- sclk: 1-bit output serial clock
- cs_n: 1-bit output chip select

3. FSM States
The SPI controller uses a 3-state FSM: IDLE, ACTIVE, DONE

4. Register Map
- 0x00: spi_ctrl (8-bit) - RW - Reset: 0x00 - Control options
- 0x04: spi_status (8-bit) - RO - Reset: 0x02 - Status indicator
- 0x08: spi_data (8-bit) - RW - Reset: 0x00 - Data buffer

5. Timing
- Max frequency: 50MHz
